restated_intent: Build the G2 Idiom gate: score how well candidate code matches this repo's conventions using deterministic embedding-distance to the repo corpus. Always ADVISORY — never blocks ship. On embedder failure, return CANNOT_DECIDE (not a 0 score) so it is excluded from report aggregation.

steps.step: Implement lgwks_gate_idiom.py with IdiomVerifier (klass=ADVISORY). Scan corpus directory for .py files, embed candidate + corpus using lgwks_embed._embedding, compute cosine similarities.
covers: always returns an ADVISORY verdict (never FAIL, never blocks ship)
emits a score in 0..1 + an idiom-diff report (nearest in-repo exemplars + deviations)

steps.step: Score = mean of top-k similarities to corpus files. Evidence = nearest exemplars (highest similarity files) + deviations (lowest similarity features).
covers: emits a score in 0..1 + an idiom-diff report (nearest in-repo exemplars + deviations)

steps.step: On lgwks_embed import failure or empty corpus, return ADVISORY+CANNOT_DECIDE with diagnosis, NOT a 0 score.
covers: on embedder failure returns ADVISORY+CANNOT_DECIDE (excluded from the report's score aggregation, surfaced separately) — NOT a 0 score

steps.step: Write tests/test_gate_idiom.py: (a) candidate similar to corpus → PASS with score, (b) embedder failure → CANNOT_DECIDE, (c) verdict klass is always ADVISORY.
covers: always returns an ADVISORY verdict (never FAIL, never blocks ship)
emits a score in 0..1 + an idiom-diff report (nearest in-repo exemplars + deviations)
on embedder failure returns ADVISORY+CANNOT_DECIDE (excluded from the report's score aggregation, surfaced separately) — NOT a 0 score

steps.step: Run python3 -m unittest discover tests and confirm all green.

invariants: no ECE/calibration acceptance is claimed — there is no held-out idiom-labeled dataset in-repo; calibration is deferred until one is constructed (logged, not asserted)
